reviews.raw_body:

reviews.author: Vlastimil (SUSE)
reviews.raw_body:
On 3/2/26 20:50, Johannes Weiner wrote:
> Move the page charge and remainder calculation into its own
> function. It will make the slab stat refactor easier to follow.

2026-03-02.patch_summary: Move the page charge and remainder calculation into its own function. It will make the slab stat refactor easier to follow.
